stemHtml: An aeroplane performs a steady horizontal, co-ordinated turn with 45 degrees of bank at 230 kt TAS. The same aeroplane with the same bank angle and speed, but at a higher mass:

options.a: will turn with the same radius, but might stall.
options.b: will have a higher rate of turn.
options.c: will turn with a larger turn radius.
options.d: will turn with a smaller turn radius.
